product: Databricks-to-Databricks Delta Sharing across regulatory domains is now availabl
tagline: June 15, 2026 Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing supports sharing across regulatory domains.
what_it_does: June 15, 2026 Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing supports sharing across regulatory domains. Commercial workspaces can also share with AWS GovCloud, AWS GovCloud DoD, and Azure China.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 15, 2026 Databricks
capabilities.desc: June 15, 2026 Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing supports sharing across regulatory domains.

key_takeaway: June 15, 2026 Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing supports sharing across regulatory domains.
